'''âd-n-n-zh''' ('''kadannezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chainsaw|chainsaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chainsaw|chainsaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-n-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadannezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidanezhoko|thidanezhoko]] || [[word:jidanezhoko|jidanezhoko]] || [[word:shidanezhoko|shidanezhoko]] || [[word:kidanezhoko|kidanezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudanezhoko|thuthudanezhoko]] || [[word:jujudanezhoko|jujudanezhoko]] || [[word:shushudanezhoko|shushudanezhoko]] || [[word:kukudanezhoko|kukudanezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudanezhoko|thudanezhoko]] || [[word:judanezhoko|judanezhoko]] || [[word:shudanezhoko|shudanezhoko]] || [[word:kudanezhoko|kudanezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodanezhoko|thodanezhoko]] || [[word:jodanezhoko|jodanezhoko]] || [[word:shodanezhoko|shodanezhoko]] || [[word:kodanezhoko|kodanezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdanezhoko|thĂŠdanezhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdanezhoko|jĂŠdanezhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdanezhoko|shĂŠdanezhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdanezhoko|kĂŠdanezhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadanezhoko|thadanezhoko]] || [[word:jadanezhoko|jadanezhoko]] || [[word:shadanezhoko|shadanezhoko]] || [[word:kadanezhoko|kadanezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadanezhoko|thadanezhoko]] || [[word:jadanezhoko|jadanezhoko]] || [[word:shadanezhoko|shadanezhoko]] || [[word:kadanezhoko|kadanezhoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
